title: thymus serpyllum var. chamaedrys
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. chamaedrys, also known as creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial herb belonging to the mint family and native to Europe. The plant possesses medicinal properties due to its essential oils, including thymol, which exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of creeping thyme include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Creeping thyme can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and potpourri, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies and home fragrances.
